rules.to: [	   {	       "id": msg.container.id,	       "host": msg.host_id,	       "network_settings": [	           {	               "network": {	                   "host": msg.host_id,	                   "name": msg.network      	               }    	           }  	       ],	       "mounts": [	           {	               "source": "/app/data",	               "volume": {	                   "name": msg.instanceShort & "-data"      	               },	               "read_only": false    	           }  	       ],	       "env": [	           {	               "var_name": msg.var_env_key,	               "value": msg.var_env_value    	           }  	       ],	       "labels": [	           {	               "key": "traefik.enable",	               "value": "true"    	           },	           {	               "key": "traefik.http.routers." & msg.instanceShort & ".rule",	               "value": "Host(`" & msg.instance & "`)"    	           },	           {	               "key": "traefik.http.routers." & msg.instanceShort & ".entrypoints",	               "value": "http"   	           },	           {	               "key": "traefik.http.services." & msg.instanceShort & ".loadbalancer.server.port",	               "value": "3000"    	           },	           {	               "key": "traefik.http.middlewares.force-https-header.headers.customrequestheaders.X-Forwarded-Proto",	               "value": "https"	           },	           {	               "key": "traefik.http.middlewares." & msg.instanceShort & ".ipallowlist.sourcerange",	               "value": "173.245.48.0/20, 103.21.244.0/22, 103.22.200.0/22, 103.31.4.0/22, 141.101.64.0/18, 108.162.192.0/18, 190.93.240.0/20, 188.114.96.0/20, 197.234.240.0/22, 198.41.128.0/17, 162.158.0.0/15, 104.16.0.0/13, 104.24.0.0/14, 172.64.0.0/13, 131.0.72.0/22, 2400:cb00::/32, 2606:4700::/32, 2803:f800::/32, 2405:b500::/32, 2405:8100::/32, 2a06:98c0::/29, 2c0f:f248::/32"    	           },	           {	               "key": "traefik.http.routers." & msg.instanceShort & ".middlewares",	               "value": "force-https-header"    	           }  	       ]	   }	]
